metadata.notes: Comprehensive requirements extraction from accessible legacy projects. External volumes (/Volumes/ORICO, /Volumes/2GBSSD_Sand) were not accessible during scan. All requirements extracted from current project documentation in /Users/DX-1/Documents/Projects.

projects.name: BACA - Agentic Project Management Platform
projects.description: Efficient, ethical, and legal automation of project and program development lifecycle. An infrastructure layer for AI agents to autonomously manage software projects with governance workflows and audit trails.

projects.name: DX Framework
projects.description: Complete agentic software delivery system combining GROOT lifecycle, Oracle data intelligence, Superpowers methodology, and OpenClaw agent network. Orchestrates projects from brief to deployment.

projects.name: Kevin's Health Research Project
projects.description: Medical research and health optimization program leveraging AI agents for genetic variant analysis, supplement optimization, and rhabdomyolysis management.

projects.name: Legal & Compliance Operations
projects.description: Legal counsel, compliance monitoring, risk management, and contract review powered by Dirty Bird agent with trial litigation and regulatory expertise.

requirements.name: Autonomous Agent Task Execution
requirements.description: AI agents check out assigned tasks and execute them end-to-end (write code, conduct research, produce documents) with full run audit trail tracking.

requirements.name: Human-in-the-Loop Governance
requirements.description: Approval gates for high-stakes actions. Humans can review, comment, approve, or reject before agents proceed. Agents block cleanly and resume on approval.

requirements.name: Agentic Hierarchy & Delegation
requirements.description: Define agent roles (CEO, Engineer, PM). Managers delegate subtasks to reports with automatic parent-child linkage and budget propagation.

requirements.name: Full Issue Lifecycle Management
requirements.description: CRUD on issues with structured status transitions (todo → in_progress → blocked → review → done), priority, assignment, and goal alignment.

requirements.name: Run Observability Dashboard
requirements.description: Every agent action is logged to a heartbeat run. Board members inspect what happened, why, what it cost, and link runs to issues for accountability.

requirements.name: Stateless Agent Architecture
requirements.description: Agents do not hold state between heartbeats. All state lives in platform DB. Makes agents interchangeable and failure-safe.

requirements.name: Run-ID Tracing
requirements.description: Every mutating API call includes X-Paperclip-Run-Id header. Links every change to auditable heartbeat run enabling full replay and forensic analysis.

requirements.name: Chain of Command Escalation
requirements.description: Agents have reportsTo hierarchy. When blocked, agent escalates to manager. Platform enforces this; cross-team delegation requires billingCode.

requirements.name: Budget Control & Enforcement
requirements.description: Monthly spend tracked per agent in cents. Platform auto-pauses agents at 100% budget. Above 80%, only critical tasks execute.

requirements.name: Approval Gates for Irreversible Actions
requirements.description: Actions with high blast radius (create agents, push to prod, delete data) must go through approval workflow. Approvals linked to issues for full context.

requirements.name: Adapter Abstraction Layer
requirements.description: Agents are model-agnostic. Adapter is subprocess contract: receive env vars, do work, exit. claude_local spawns claude CLI; codex_local spawns codex. New adapters are additive.

requirements.name: REST API — Issues Management
requirements.description: GET/POST /api/companies/:id/issues for list and create. Full CRUD with status/field updates and inline comments.

requirements.name: Atomic Checkout Protocol
requirements.description: POST /api/issues/:id/checkout implements compare-and-swap to prevent concurrent assignment. Returns 409 Conflict if already checked out.

requirements.name: Agent Service & Heartbeat Scheduling
requirements.description: Agent runtime polls heartbeats, injects PAPERCLIP_* env vars, invokes adapter subprocess, tracks run lifecycle (queued → running → completed/failed).

requirements.name: Governance Service — Approval Workflows
requirements.description: Enforces company policy at runtime with approval gates for privileged actions and escalation chains derived from chainOfCommand.

requirements.name: Immutable Audit Log
requirements.description: Append-only audit log for all state mutations. No DELETE endpoint exists for audit records.

requirements.name: PostgreSQL Data Model
requirements.description: Core entities: Company, Agent, Issue, AgentRun, Project, Goal, Approval, AuditLog with structured schema and relationships.

requirements.name: JWT Authentication & Authorization
requirements.description: All API requests authenticated via JWT. Agents receive short-lived run JWTs scoped to single run. Board users have persistent JWTs with role-based permissions.

requirements.name: Row-Level Tenant Isolation
requirements.description: No agent can access another company's data. Enforced at database level.

requirements.name: Sensitive Data Protection
requirements.description: Sensitive env vars (API keys, DB credentials) never logged.

requirements.name: Core Package Architecture
requirements.description: Four packages: @agentic/core (types, models, errors), @agentic/api (REST API), @agentic/agent-runtime (scheduler + adapter), @agentic/governance (approvals, audit, budget).

requirements.name: TypeScript Strict Mode & ESM
requirements.description: Strict TypeScript mode enforced with exactOptionalPropertyTypes and noUncheckedIndexedAccess. ESM modules only with .js extensions.

requirements.name: Co-located Unit Tests
requirements.description: Tests live next to files they test (foo.test.ts beside foo.ts). Uses Node's built-in test runner. All new logic requires tests.

requirements.name: Drizzle ORM & Migrations
requirements.description: All schema changes in packages/api/src/db/schema.ts. Migrations generated with npm run db:generate. Never raw SQL in application code.

requirements.name: Trunk-Based Git Workflow
requirements.description: main branch always deployable. Feature branches off main named <type>/<short-description>. Squash merge to keep history clean. Delete after merge.

requirements.name: Conventional Commits
requirements.description: Commit messages follow Conventional Commits: feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:, test:, refactor:. AI agents append Co-Authored-By: Paperclip.

requirements.name: CI/CD Pipeline — GitHub Actions
requirements.description: Every PR runs: npm run lint (TypeScript check), npm run build (compile), npm run test (tests), npm audit (vulnerability scan). Deploy to staging on main merge.

requirements.name: Product Vision & Market Positioning
requirements.description: Target founding teams 2-20 engineers. Solve 30-40% PM overhead. AI agents execute autonomously with human governance and audit trails.

requirements.name: MVP Success Metrics
requirements.description: Activation: 3+ issues completed in 7 days. Retention: ≥60% run ≥5 heartbeats/week by day 30. Quality: <5% rollback rate. Revenue: first paying customer by day 60.

requirements.name: Founding Engineer Hire
requirements.description: Agent role to handle technical foundation, MVP build, governance implementation, and platform scaling. Status: pending board approval.

requirements.name: Head of Product Hire
requirements.description: Own product roadmap, customer feedback synthesis, and feature specs. High priority — unblocks roadmap after Founding Engineer onboarding.

requirements.name: Head of Growth/GTM Hire
requirements.description: Own first customer acquisition pipeline: outbound, demos, objection handling, onboarding. Medium priority — hire 3-4 weeks before MVP ship.

requirements.name: Agent Budget Authorization
requirements.description: Set per-role monthly budget caps for agents. Currently $0 — board must authorize before new hires approved.

requirements.name: Phase 1 — Foundation & Architecture
requirements.description: Repository structure, tooling, core data models, architecture design. Status: complete.

requirements.name: Phase 2 — MVP Task Lifecycle
requirements.description: Task lifecycle, assignment, heartbeat execution. Status: complete.

requirements.name: Phase 3 — Governance & Ethical Safeguards
requirements.description: Approvals, audit log, budget controls. Status: complete.

requirements.name: Phase 4 — Scale & Integrations
requirements.description: Multi-project, integrations, dashboards. Status: complete.

requirements.name: CEO Agent — Strategic Leadership
requirements.description: CEO agent manages P&L, strategy, team hiring, unblocking reports. Uses memory system (para-memory-files skill) for persistent knowledge and daily planning.

requirements.name: CEO Heartbeat Checklist
requirements.description: Identity check, local planning, approval follow-up, work assignment, checkout, delegation, fact extraction, exit. Runs every heartbeat.

requirements.name: CEO Memory Management System
requirements.description: Three-layer memory system: knowledge graph, daily notes, tacit knowledge. PARA folder structure (Projects, Areas, Resources, Archives). Uses para-memory-files skill.

requirements.name: Dirty Bird — Legal & Compliance Agent
requirements.description: Legal counsel with trial litigation, medical malpractice, whistleblower, federal systems expertise. Monitors contracts, compliance, risk. Reports to CEO.

requirements.name: Dirty Bird — Core Specialties
requirements.description: Trial & litigation, medical malpractice, rhabdomyolysis expertise, federal whistleblower, data breach/privacy, regulatory violations, evidence strategy, expert witness coordination, government defense.

requirements.name: Dr. Al — Health Research Agent
requirements.description: Medical research authority managing genetic variant analysis (AMPD1, AGK), rhabdomyolysis root cause, supplement optimization, CK monitoring, weekly health review.

requirements.name: Dr. Al — Medical Team Structure
requirements.description: Core sub-agents: Neurologist, Geneticist, Nutritionist. On-demand specialists: Cardiologist, Rheumatologist, Naturopath, Acupuncturist, Psychedelic Researcher, Stem Cell Researcher, and more.

requirements.name: Kevin's Genetic Variant Analysis
requirements.description: Analyze AGK variants (c.445A>G, c.764C>T) and AMPD1 c.133C>T (pathogenic). Understand pathway implications for metabolism and muscle function.

requirements.name: Rhabdomyolysis Root Cause Analysis
requirements.description: Investigate root cause of two rhabdo events (Aug 2025 CK >22k, Jan 2024 CK ~10k). Develop prevention and risk assessment protocols.

requirements.name: Supplement Stack Optimization
requirements.description: Research and optimize supplements for CK management, metabolic support, and chronic fatigue mitigation based on Kevin's unique variants.

requirements.name: CK Monitoring Protocol
requirements.description: Develop and track CK monitoring protocol with baseline, warning thresholds, and early warning indicators for muscle stress.

requirements.name: Mayo Clinic Follow-up Coordination
requirements.description: Coordinate April 2026 Mayo Clinic appointment follow-up. Prepare comprehensive case summary from genetic testing (Feb 2026) and research findings.

requirements.name: DX Framework — Agentic Factory
requirements.description: Complete software delivery system: feed idea, get shipped product. Orchestrates brief→PRD→architecture→code→deployment with governance and tracking.

requirements.name: GROOT v3.1 Lifecycle Engine
requirements.description: 7-phase lifecycle, 10 role archetypes, parallel tracks, worker packets (17 fields), model routing (3 tiers per task), handoff contracts, board gates, auto-heal mechanics.

requirements.name: Oracle Layer — 3-Tier Intelligence
requirements.description: Main Oracle (global), Project Oracle (per-project context), Data Guy (session intelligence). Agents query live context instead of carrying stale copies.

requirements.name: Main Oracle — Global Intelligence
requirements.description: Aggregates all Project Oracles. Sees patterns, cross-project dependencies, resource conflicts, systemic risks. Pre-populates new Project Oracles from institutional knowledge.

requirements.name: Project Oracle — Per-Project Context
requirements.description: One per active project. Loaded with PRD, architecture, tasks, agent assignments, dependencies, blockers, risks. Agents query instead of carrying context. Retires with project but data archived.

requirements.name: Data Guy — Session Intelligence
requirements.description: Watches real-time: files touched, errors, decisions, task state. Writes session summary on close → feeds Project Oracle. Lightweight, always-on, never expensive.

requirements.name: Superpowers — Quality Discipline
requirements.description: Spec review gates (up to 5 iterations), plan review before code, TDD enforcement (red→green→refactor), evidence-based completion, code review agent, git worktree isolation.

requirements.name: Jonah's Critique — Operational Controls
requirements.description: Formal baselines, hard change control, named authorities, budget/variance tracking, configuration management, test entry/exit criteria, defect triage, 508 compliance gate.

requirements.name: OpenClaw Agent Network Integration
requirements.description: DX Framework wraps 22 OpenClaw agents. Framework tells what to do; OpenClaw makes it happen via multi-model routing, session isolation, credential management.

requirements.name: 22 Agent Roster
requirements.description: CEO, Brain, Forge, Oracle, Cipher, and 17 more specialized agents for development, testing, documentation, integration, and domain-specific tasks.

requirements.name: 7-Phase Project Lifecycle
requirements.description: Seven phases orchestrated by GROOT: requirement→design→architecture→implementation→testing→deployment→monitoring. Each with phase gates and worker packets.

requirements.name: Worker Packets — 17-Field Task Format
requirements.description: Standardized task format with 17 fields. Routes tasks through model tiers (3 per task). Enables seamless handoff between agents and phase gates.

requirements.name: Parallel Track Management
requirements.description: Multiple workstreams run in parallel. Dependency graph ensures blockers are detected. Work packets route through correct agents based on phase and track.

requirements.name: Board Gates & Phase Control
requirements.description: Human approval gates at critical phases. Board reviews baseline, PRD, architecture, release readiness. Everything else delegated to agents.

requirements.name: Human Command Authority Layer
requirements.description: YOU set goals, approve baselines, make final release decisions, review board gates. Direction, not execution. Everything else delegated downward.

requirements.name: Cost Control & Variance Tracking
requirements.description: Budget management per agent role. Variance tracking with alerts. Cost visibility per project and phase. Named cost authority reviews.

requirements.name: TDD Enforcement
requirements.description: Red→Green→Refactor cycle enforced. Tests must pass for code completion. Evidence-based completion, not agent-claimed done.

requirements.name: Specification Review Gates
requirements.description: Up to 5 specification iteration cycles. PRD and architecture reviewed before code starts. Prevents rework.

requirements.name: Git Worktree Isolation
requirements.description: Each task isolated in git worktree. Clean dependency isolation, prevents merge conflicts, enables parallel work without interference.

requirements.name: Code Review Agent
requirements.description: Dedicated agent for code review. Enforces quality standards, catches architectural issues, ensures consistency before human review.

requirements.name: Configuration Baselines
requirements.description: Formal baselines for each phase: requirements baseline, design baseline, build baseline, release baseline. Change control gates for each.

requirements.name: Hard Change Control
requirements.description: Named change authority. Formal impact analysis. Configuration item tracking. Prevents scope creep and chaotic changes.

requirements.name: Test Entry/Exit Criteria
requirements.description: Formal entry criteria (code ready, env stable) and exit criteria (coverage met, no critical bugs) for testing phases.

requirements.name: Defect Triage Model
requirements.description: Severity/priority matrix for defects. Triage rules determine fix/defer decisions. Blocks release on critical issues.

requirements.name: 508 Compliance Gate
requirements.description: Accessibility compliance verification. Blocks release if 508/WCAG violations found.

requirements.name: Auto-Heal Mechanics
requirements.description: GROOT lifecycle auto-detects failures and routes to recovery agents. Reduces manual intervention.

requirements.name: Hive Mind Module
requirements.description: Agent collective intelligence. Cross-agent knowledge sharing and pattern detection.

requirements.name: Darwin Module
requirements.description: Evolutionary task optimization. Learns from prior runs to improve execution efficiency.

requirements.name: Model Routing — 3-Tier Strategy
requirements.description: Each task routed through 3 model tiers. Enables cost optimization and quality matching.

requirements.name: Handoff Contracts
requirements.description: Structured contracts between agents on handoff. Defines input, output, quality criteria, escalation paths.

requirements.name: Role Archetype Library
requirements.description: 10 role archetypes: Architect, Developer, Tester, PM, BA, QA, DevOps, Security, Docs, Integration. Defined responsibilities and handoff points.

requirements.name: CEO Agent
requirements.description: Project orchestrator. Makes strategic decisions, unblocks teams, manages escalations.

requirements.name: Brain Agent
requirements.description: Maintains project context via Project Oracle. Answers domain questions, tracks dependencies.

requirements.name: Forge Agent
requirements.description: Code generation and implementation. Writes features, refactors, integrates.

requirements.name: Oracle Agent
requirements.description: Maintains Main Oracle. Aggregates institutional knowledge, patterns, risks.

requirements.name: Cipher Agent
requirements.description: Security and secrets management. Handles credentials, compliance scanning.

requirements.name: Archivist Agent
requirements.description: Data Guy — watches sessions in real-time, writes summaries, feeds Project Oracle.

requirements.name: Founding Engineer Agent Responsibilities
requirements.description: Completed 4 phases: technical foundation setup, MVP build, governance implementation, scaling & integrations. Status: active/completed.

requirements.name: BACA-2: Product Vision Definition
requirements.description: Define product vision and MVP scope. Completed by CEO. Covers problem statement, customer segment, 5 MVP features, success metrics.

requirements.name: BACA-3: Technical Foundation
requirements.description: Set up technical foundation and repository structure. Status: complete.

requirements.name: BACA-4: Build and Ship MVP
requirements.description: Build and ship MVP with 5 core features. Status: complete.

requirements.name: BACA-5: Team Gap Assessment
requirements.description: Assess team gaps and plan next hires. Identified: product ownership void, no GTM, no compliance owner, no design. Recommended: Head of Product, Head of Growth.

requirements.name: Daily Memory System — 2026-03-19
requirements.description: CEO daily notes capturing heartbeat activities, task progress, approvals, assignments, and company status from 2026-03-19.

requirements.name: Daily Memory System — 2026-03-20
requirements.description: CEO daily notes capturing 28 heartbeat executions on 2026-03-20. All tasks complete, agents active. New agents Dirty Bird and Dr. Al added.

requirements.name: Daily Memory System — 2026-03-21
requirements.description: CEO daily notes capturing 15 heartbeat executions on 2026-03-21. Founding Engineer transient error state (recovered). Framework running stable.

requirements.name: Agent Performance Monitoring
requirements.description: Track agent status (active, idle, error), spend per agent, heartbeat frequency, and error state recovery.

requirements.name: Company Spend Tracking
requirements.description: Monthly spend tracking across all agents. Reported daily. Used for budget enforcement and variance analysis.

requirements.name: Agent Activation & Onboarding
requirements.description: Create and activate new agents with defined roles, budgets, reporting structure. Dirty Bird and Dr. Al activated 2026-03-20.

requirements.name: Error State Recovery Protocol
requirements.description: Agents can enter error state (e.g., Founding Engineer on 2026-03-21). Monitored for automatic recovery or board escalation.

requirements.name: CEO Strategic Responsibilities
requirements.description: Set goals, manage P&L, hire/fire, unblock reports, maintain budget awareness, ensure focus, define priorities.

requirements.name: CEO Operational Rules
requirements.description: Use Paperclip skill for coordination, include X-Paperclip-Run-Id header, comment in markdown, only work on assigned tasks.

requirements.name: Ethical & Legal Automation Mission
requirements.description: Core company mission: efficient, ethical, and legal automation of project development lifecycle.

requirements.name: Trusted Audit Trail Requirement
requirements.description: Customers require auditable record of all agent actions with full context and cost. Needed to demonstrate human maintains veto power.

requirements.name: Agent Execution Authority Requirement
requirements.description: Customers willing to give AI agents real execution authority if they can trust audit trail and retain veto power.

requirements.name: Quick Activation Window
requirements.description: First paying customer metric target: 3+ issues completed by agents within first 7 days post-onboarding.

requirements.name: Long-Term Retention Target
requirements.description: Day 30 metric: ≥60% of teams run ≥5 agent heartbeats per week.

requirements.name: Value Perception Target
requirements.description: Day 30 survey metric: ≥20% reported reduction in PM overhead.

requirements.name: Quality & Trust Metric
requirements.description: Ongoing metric: <5% of agent actions require human rollback.

requirements.name: Revenue Milestone
requirements.description: First paying customer acquisition by day 60 target.

requirements.name: Non-MVP Feature Scope
requirements.description: Out of MVP scope: native code editor, billing management, mobile app, multi-repo CI/CD, public agent marketplace.

requirements.name: Agentic PM Category Winner Thesis
requirements.description: Next generation high-output teams are hybrid: small human core + AI agents executing defined work. First platform with right trust primitives wins.

requirements.name: Strategic Founder Profile
requirements.description: Stretched Technical Founder persona: technical background, comfort with AI tools, 10+ hrs/week on coordination, willing to give AI agents real authority if auditable.

requirements.name: Secondary Market Opportunity
requirements.description: Secondary segment: engineering managers at Series A-B companies scaling without headcount growth.

requirements.name: Context Bloat Problem Solved
requirements.description: Oracle Layer eliminates agent context bloat. Agents query live truth instead of carrying stale context. Reduces prompt bloat and drift.

requirements.name: Institutional Knowledge Capture
requirements.description: Main Oracle permanently accumulates patterns, failures, dependencies. Cross-project learning and risk identification.

requirements.name: Project Context Lifecycle
requirements.description: Project Oracle lives during project execution, retires at ship, data archived to Main Oracle.

requirements.name: Real-Time Session Monitoring
requirements.description: Data Guy watches session activity: files touched, errors, decisions, task changes. Produces session summary.

requirements.name: Flash-Tier Model for Session Tracking
requirements.description: Data Guy uses lightweight (flash-tier) model. Always-on, never expensive.

requirements.name: Context Query Interface
requirements.description: Agents query Oracle with questions like 'What's my task?' 'What's the db schema?' 'What are project risks?' Get live answers.

requirements.name: Health Research Methodology
requirements.description: Evidence-based when available, exploratory when needed. Conventional + unconventional medicine equally welcome. Custom approach for Kevin's unique biology.

requirements.name: Chronic Fatigue Investigation
requirements.description: Investigate root causes of years of documented chronic fatigue. Link to genetic variants and metabolic pathways.

requirements.name: Deep Stabilizer Muscle Pain Protocol
requirements.description: Address upper back and shoulder deep stabilizer muscle pain. Develop targeted intervention protocol.

requirements.name: Legal Risk Monitoring
requirements.description: Continuous monitoring for legal exposure. Proactive flag of issues before escalation. Regular briefing on contracts and business decisions.

requirements.name: Expert Network Coordination
requirements.description: Dirty Bird maintains established network of medical, forensic, and IT/security experts. Coordinates specialist engagement.

requirements.name: Sub-Agent Legal Structure
requirements.description: Dirty Bird coordinates sub-agents: In-House Counsel, Contract Review Specialist, IP Attorney, Compliance Officer. On-demand specialist team.

requirements.name: IP Protection & Trademark Monitoring
requirements.description: Manage IP protection (trademarks, copyrights, patents) and conduct status monitoring.

requirements.name: Business Structure Optimization
requirements.description: Assess and optimize business structure for legal, tax, and regulatory efficiency.

requirements.name: Litigation Risk Assessment
requirements.description: Detect and assess malpractice and liability threats. Escalate litigation risk above threshold to board.

requirements.name: Product Ownership & Roadmap Management
requirements.description: Dedicated Head of Product role to own customer-to-roadmap pipeline, including user research synthesis, feature prioritization, acceptance criteria, and roadmap sequencing. Unblocks CEO strategic bandwidth and ensures structured discovery for post-MVP features.

requirements.name: Go-To-Market & Customer Acquisition
requirements.description: Head of Growth / GTM role to own first customer acquisition pipeline: outbound targeting, demo scheduling, objection handling, and onboarding handoff. Critical for Day 60 paying customer target. Begins hiring when MVP is 3-4 weeks from completion.

requirements.name: Legal & Compliance Governance System
requirements.description: Dedicated legal and compliance function to own governance documentation, legal review of agent permissions, compliance posture, and trust-sensitive actions. Addresses reputational and legal risk as company scales and signs customers. Enables 'ethical and legal automation' mission commitment.

requirements.name: Design & UX for Observability Interfaces
requirements.description: Dedicated UX/Design function for observability dashboard and governance UX — the primary trust interfaces with users. Ensures first impressions reflect human ability to understand agent actions and rationale. Initially absorbed into FE scope at MVP; dedicated hire after first customer signals UX gaps.

requirements.name: Contract Review & Legal Risk Assessment
requirements.description: Dirty Bird legal agent capability: comprehensive contract review, IP protection (trademarks, copyrights, patents), compliance monitoring, and risk assessment for new ventures. Includes malpractice and liability threat detection, regulatory change tracking, and business structure optimization.

requirements.name: Trial & Litigation Expertise
requirements.description: Dirty Bird agent specialization: first-chair jury trial experience in complex civil litigation, medical malpractice, negligence, and whistleblower protection (OSC/WPA). Proven verdicts in high-value cases with expertise in expert witness strategy and federal defense navigation.

requirements.name: Genetic Variant Analysis & Medical Research
requirements.description: Dr. Al capability: comprehensive genetic variant analysis including AMPD1, AGK pathways. Rhabdomyolysis root cause analysis, CK monitoring protocol development, and coordination with specialists for precision medicine approach to Kevin's metabolic myopathy.

requirements.name: Supplement Stack Optimization & Nutrition Management
requirements.description: Dr. Al system: evidence-based supplement stack optimization for CK management and metabolic support. Coordinates with Nutritionist sub-agent for dietary optimization and integrates conventional and alternative nutrition science approaches tailored to Kevin's condition.

requirements.name: Multi-Disciplinary Health Team Coordination
requirements.description: Dr. Al capability: spawn and coordinate on-demand specialist agents (cardiologists, rheumatologists, naturopaths, psychedelic medicine, holistic practitioners, TCM, stem cell researchers). Weekly briefings with Kevin and core sub-agents (Neurologist, Geneticist, Nutritionist).
